Query
  Let $base
    Pipeline
      From
        Source main
      Stage where
        Binary ==
          Ident service
          String "payment-service"
  Let $pay_errs
    Pipeline
      From
        Source $base
      Stage where
        Binary ==
          Ident status
          Int 500
  Pipeline
    From
      Source $pay_errs
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
        Agg
          Call sum
            Ident amount_cents
          Alias total
